stage_identity.evidence: Byte displays canonical teen form with gangly proportions, blue body, big expressive eyes. Silhouette matches teen stage anchor.

pixel_style.evidence: Clean 2D pixel art forms preserved with dithered shading. No painterly or photoreal artifacts.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Evening warm golden lighting visible. Ecstatic mood reflected in wide eyes and relaxed posture. Hands on keyboard position maintained.

artifact_free.evidence: No text leakage, no floating glyphs, no malformed anatomy, no duplicated parts, no smeared objects.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Exactly one golden 10-day trophy on left of shelf, exactly one green plant on right of shelf with clear spacing between them. Exactly one food bowl on floor to right of desk with moderate kibble. No prop overlap or duplication.

anchors_present.evidence: Desk surface visible and centered. Oversized silver laptop present and open. Chicago skyline visible through window in background.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Evening warm golden lighting matches time_of_day=evening and time_of_day_transition=afternoon_to_evening. Ecstatic mood (100% happiness) reflected in wide eyes and energetic posture. is_sleeping=false confirmed by awake pose.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Check not applicable for normal mode - no re-ground operation performed this cycle.
